message:
fix(capacity): add structured error types for compat gate registration limits

compat_gate.rs:
- Add CompatGateRegistrationError enum with ShimCapacityExceeded and
  PredicateCapacityExceeded variants, each carrying capacity context
- Add error_codes module with ERR_COMPAT_SHIM_CAPACITY and
  ERR_COMPAT_PREDICATE_CAPACITY constants
- Change register_shim() and register_predicate() from void to
  Result<(), CompatGateRegistrationError> — reject at capacity instead
  of silently evicting active entries
- Implement Display and Error traits for structured error reporting
- Update all callers and test fixtures to handle Result returns

compatibility_gate.rs:
- Update policy compilation to propagate capacity errors from compat gate
- Adjust predicate registration flow for Result-returning API

eviction_saga.rs:
- Adapt eviction saga to handle capacity-aware registration responses
- Add eviction path tests for capacity boundary conditions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
